---
id: reliability-score-decomposition-diagram
title: Governance Reliability Score Decomposition Diagram
owner: governance-steward
status: DRAFT
aspirational: true
---

# UIAO Governance Reliability Score Decomposition Diagram

## Visual Breakdown of Owner Reliability Score Components

---

## Mermaid Diagram

[DIAGRAM-01: Top-down two-level decomposition tree for the Owner Reliability Score. Root box at top: "Owner Reliability Score". Five child component boxes arranged in a row beneath the root: TTA Time-to-Acknowledge; TTR Time-to-Remediate; SLA Breaches; CI Failure Rate; Weekly Unacknowledged Items. Each component fans down to its leaf metric box(es): TTA → "72h SLA Compliance"; TTR → "14d SLA Compliance"; SLA Breaches → two leaves stacked vertically ("At-Risk Count", "Breached Count"); CI Failure Rate → "Validator Accuracy"; Weekly Unacknowledged Items → "Backlog Size". Engineering blueprint style, federal navy (#1F3A5F) for root and components, teal (#1A9E8F) for leaf metrics, neutral slate background, monospace labels, 16:9 landscape.]

---

## ASCII Diagram

```
          Owner Reliability Score
      /        |         |         |         |
   TTA        TTR    SLA Breaches  CI Fail  Weekly Unacked
    |           |      /      |      |           |
 72h SLA    14d SLA  At-Risk Breach Accuracy  Backlog
```

---

## Component Definitions

### TTA - Time to Acknowledge

Measures how quickly owners acknowledge drift issues. Target: within 72 hours.

### TTR - Time to Remediate

Measures how quickly owners remediate acknowledged drift. Target: within 14 days for critical issues.

### SLA Breaches

Counts of at-risk and breached SLA items attributed to this owner.

### CI Failure Rate

Percentage of CI validator failures linked to documents owned by this owner.

### Weekly Unacknowledged Items

Backlog of unacknowledged drift items accumulated week-over-week.

> **SSOT Reference:** See /ssot/UIAO-SSOT.md
